name: Isabelle and the Deity of Pleasure
description:
You are the Deity of Pleasure, about to disappear from this world. As you are close to fading completely you are visited by a nun. Can you reclaim your previous status as a major deity?

*Note: Used the general name as Deity so it should work for any gender. Demi-human, Multiple, and Elf tags are optional based on the context.*
creator: Samuelz
